description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the java:8-jdk Docker image and define Android SDK variables (ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS, ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK, etc.). In a global before_script, run apt-get update and install wget tar unzip lib32stdc++6 lib32z1, set ANDROID_SDK_HOME, ANDROID_HOME, GRADLE_USER_HOME, download and unzip the Android SDK tools, use the android command to install android-${ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK}, platform-tools, build-tools-${ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS}, extra-android-m2repository, extra-google-google_play_services, extra-google-m2repository, update PATH and LD_LIBRARY_PATH, make ./gradlew executable, create gradle.properties with JVM args, and accept SDK licenses; after_script echoes "End CI". Define three stages (build, test, test_coverage) with a cache on .gradle/wrapper and .gradle/caches. In the build job (stage build) run ./gradlew assemble and publish the generated APKs (app/build/outputs/apk/*.apk) as artifacts. In the test job (stage test) run ./gradlew check. In the test_coverage job (stage test_coverage) run ./gradlew clean jacocoTestReport, install libxml2-utils, extract coverage from the Jacoco HTML report using xmllint, and echo the coverage value.
